_comment: Cases keyed to the ingested 'Desk User Manual.pdf' (Maidesite standing desk). Because the corpus is a single document, hit-rate is matched at the PAGE level (expected_page) — source-level would be a trivial 100%. expected_page uses 1-indexed PDF pages (matches the [file p.N] citations). keyword_score checks the answer contains the expected grounded terms. Re-curate these if you ingest a different corpus. Bonus manual anti-hallucination check (not scored here): ask 'What is the warranty period?' — the manual doesn't cover it, so a correct system replies 'I don't know based on the provided documents.'

cases.question: How do I reset the desk?
How do I set a memory height preset on the hand controller?
How do I lock the control panel display?
What is the difference between Jog and Continuation mode?
What is the USB port output voltage and current?
What height range can the maximum and minimum height limits be set to?
What is the tallest object I can place underneath the desk?
How long does assembly take and how many people are needed?
